Hero.title: Building the future through
Hero.description: Hi! I'm Josep, an upcoming Software Engineer. I'm passionate about solving complex problems, learning new technologies, and creating modern, efficient, and scalable web applications.

Projects.title: My Featured
Projects.description: A selection of projects and practices I have developed during my Software Engineering education, showcasing my technical and problem-solving skills.

Skills.title: My
Skills.description: Set of technologies and tools I use to transform ideas into functional and attractive digital products.
Skills.currentFocusDesc: Deeply focused on the Mobile ecosystem with Kotlin.

About.title: About
About.description: Learn a bit more about my story, my approach to software engineering, and what motivates me every day.
About.headline: Upcoming Software Engineer passionate about creating solutions that matter.
About.p1: Since I wrote my first line of code, I discovered that programming is much more than math and logic; it's a powerful tool to solve real problems and improve people's lives.
About.p2: I am currently in the final stretch of my Software Engineering degree. During my studies, I have focused not only on passing subjects but on building tangible projects, understanding the architecture behind applications, and adopting good development practices (Clean Code, SOLID, agile methodologies).
About.p3: My goal is to join a dynamic team where I can add value from day one, face new technical challenges, and continue growing professionally.

Experience.title: Experience &
Experience.description: A journey through my academic projects, internships, and my evolution as a developer.
